member.name: T:OmniVideo.OmniVideoClient
member.summary: Client for the Omni Video API () — generate video and image content with the Gemini Omni Video series of models.

member.name: M:OmniVideo.OmniVideoClient.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Construct a client. If is null, the OMNIVIDEO_API_KEY environment variable is read. Get a key from .

member.name: M:OmniVideo.OmniVideoClient.GetTaskAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetch the current state of a task.

member.name: M:OmniVideo.OmniVideoClient.RunAsync(OmniVideo.CreateTaskInput,OmniVideo.RunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a task and poll until it reaches a terminal state.

member.name: P:OmniVideo.OmniVideoException.Code
member.summary: Business code returned by the API (200=ok, 0=biz fail), if any.

member.name: T:OmniVideo.TaskInfo
member.summary: State of a generation job returned by the Omni Video API.
